creator: bennybroz105@gmail.com
text: I have problem with InnoDB storage engine when installing MariaDB 10.2 from scratch. The storage engine is not installed after starting the server for the first time. I've tried `make config` and selecting INNOBASE and XTRADB option, and looks like the selection is not honored. I seek for references in the source tarball and found a different CMake compilation option than what is written in port's Makefile. please consider the patch attached to fix the problem.
